en.title: Best Portable Ice Makers 2026
en.description: Ranked by ice quality, production speed, noise, and real-summer usability — from $129 bullet machines to flagship nugget and crescent ice models.

zh-tw.title: 最佳桌上型製冰機 2026
zh-tw.description: 從台幣四千有找的子彈冰機到雪花冰旗艦，依據冰塊口感、產冰速度、噪音和台灣夏季實用度綜合排名。

en.description: Flagship 38-lb/day nugget ice maker with side tank, Wi-Fi scheduling, and SmartHQ app maintenance alerts.

zh-tw.description: 旗艦級雪花冰機，每天可產 38 磅軟糯雪花冰，附側水箱、Wi-Fi 排程、SmartHQ App 維護提醒，是雪花冰的標竿機種。

en.description: Self-dispensing nugget ice maker producing up to 56 lb/day of soft chewable pellet ice with one-button self-cleaning.

zh-tw.description: 自動取冰式雪花冰機，每天可產 56 磅軟糯雪花冰，一鍵自清，價格只要 GE Opal 一半，是雪花冰的高 CP 值首選。

en.description: Compact 28-lb/day bullet ice maker with two ice sizes, 8-minute first batch, and the quietest operation in its class.

zh-tw.description: 桌上型子彈冰機，每天 28 磅產量，兩種冰塊尺寸可選，首批冰塊 8 分鐘出爐，這個價位最安靜的機種。

en.description: Smallest-footprint nugget ice maker with built-in carry handle, 26-lb/day output, and 7-minute first batch — designed for small kitchens and RVs.

zh-tw.description: 體積最小的雪花冰機，內建提把方便搬動，每天 26 磅產量，首批冰塊 7 分鐘完成，小套房、露營車、辦公室都適合。

en.description: 26-lb/day bullet ice maker with integrated carry handle, auto five-cycle self-cleaning, and LED control panel — built for tailgates and camping.

zh-tw.description: 26 磅日產量子彈冰機，整合式提把設計，內建五段式自動清潔，LED 控制面板簡單直覺，戶外露營、烤肉派對都好用。

en.description: CES 2026 Innovation Award crescent ice maker — flowing-water process produces clear, slow-melting cubes that last 30 minutes longer than standard ice.

zh-tw.description: CES 2026 創新獎得主，流水製冰技術做出餐廳等級透明月牙冰，融化速度比一般冰慢 30 分鐘，威士忌、手沖咖啡、調酒愛好者的首選。

en.description: 40-lb/day clear cube ice maker — produces a batch of crystal-clear cubes every 7 minutes with BPA-free water-contact parts.

zh-tw.description: 每天 40 磅的透明冰塊冰機，每 7 分鐘出一批晶瑩剔透的方冰，水路用無雙酚 A 材質，是 home bar 玩家的進階首選。

en.description: 26-lb/day compact bullet ice maker with 2.3-quart reservoir and 9-cube batches every 5–6 minutes — the budget benchmark.

zh-tw.description: 26 磅日產量子彈冰機，2.3 夸脫水箱，每 5 到 6 分鐘出 9 顆冰塊，預算有限想試水溫的入門首選。

en.description: 48-lb/day clear cube ice maker producing restaurant-quality dense ice in 15 minutes — stainless steel build with see-through window.

zh-tw.description: 48 磅日產量透明方冰機，15 分鐘出一批餐廳等級高密度冰塊，不鏽鋼機身配可視窗，產量大但體積也大，適合 home bar 重度使用者。

en.description: 44-lb/day nugget ice maker with touchscreen control, one-tap 9-cube dispense, and the largest daily production in its price class.

zh-tw.description: 44 磅日產量雪花冰機，觸控面板加一鍵出 9 顆冰塊，同價位產量最大的選項，但長期可靠度不如 GE Opal。

references.title: The best countertop ice makers in 2026, tried and tested
6 Best Countertop Ice Makers of 2026, Tested and Reviewed
GE Profile Opal 2.0 Ultra Nugget Ice Maker
Euhomy Luna Pro Portable Crescent Ice Maker — CES 2026 Innovation Award

en.commentary:
I've tested this category through three summers now, and the GE Profile Opal 2.0 earns the top position for a specific reason that goes beyond ice quality: it is the only machine in this class that treats ice making as a scheduled background task rather than an event you have to manage. Set it to start producing at 4 PM through the SmartHQ app, and a full bin of soft chewable nuggets is waiting when guests arrive at 7. The 38-lb daily output is enough for a family of four with weekend entertaining, and the scale-inhibiting filter on the Ultra variant solves the single biggest reliability complaint about nugget machines. At $579 it costs roughly four times what a Frigidaire EFIC189 does, and for most buyers that gap is worth it — nugget ice is genuinely different from bullet ice in a way that matters every single day.

The Costway self-dispensing nugget at $299 is the rational mid-tier choice, and I'd recommend it to anyone who hesitates at the GE price. The 56-lb daily output actually exceeds the Opal, the self-dispensing mechanism solves the basket-scooping friction, and the chewable nugget texture is close enough to the Opal that side-by-side blind tests reveal only modest differences. The trade-off is software maturity — there is no app, no scheduling, and the maintenance experience is meaningfully less polished. For buyers who want nugget ice and don't care about scheduling or app integration, this is the correct answer.

The Hamilton Beach 86150 at $149 deserves the third position despite producing bullet ice instead of nuggets, because it solves a different problem completely. It is the quietest portable ice maker I've measured, it produces a first batch in 8 minutes, and at $149 it costs less than a single nice cocktail night out. For households where the ice maker lives on a kitchen counter and gets used for water bottles, iced coffee, and casual entertaining, the nugget premium is hard to justify against this much value.

The Euhomy Luna Pro deserves serious consideration if your primary use case is cocktails or whiskey. The crescent cubes melt 30 minutes slower than bullet ice, the clear flowing-water process eliminates the cloudy core that ruins photogenic drinks, and the CES 2026 Innovation Award reflects a real product breakthrough — clear crescent ice has been a commercial-only format until this year. The $399 price tag is high, but the use case is specific and the result is genuinely better than every cube alternative on this list.

The Frigidaire EFIC189 at $99 remains the right call for renters, dorm rooms, and anyone testing whether they want a portable ice maker at all. It produces 26 pounds of decent bullet ice daily, it is quiet enough at 67 dB to live with, and the failure rate after one year is acceptable for a sub-$100 appliance. Buy this first, and upgrade to nugget or crescent only if you find yourself using ice daily.

highlights.title: Nugget ice is worth the four-times price premium over bullet ice for daily users
highlights.body: The GE Profile Opal 2.0 costs $579 against the Frigidaire EFIC189's $99, and that 4x gap feels indefensible on paper. After three summers of side-by-side testing, the answer is clear: if you use ice daily, the nugget premium pays back in the first month. Nugget ice absorbs flavor from drinks rather than diluting them, it is chewable in a way that turns a glass of water into a small ritual, and it cools drinks faster because the surface-area-to-volume ratio is dramatically higher than a bullet cube. For occasional ice users — water bottles, weekend guests, the rare iced coffee — bullet ice is fine and the EFIC189 is the correct purchase. For daily users, the Opal is the only correct purchase in this category.

highlights.title: Costway is the rational alternative to GE Opal for nugget ice on a budget
highlights.body: The Costway self-dispensing nugget produces 56 pounds of nugget ice daily for $299 — that is more daily output than the GE Opal's 38 pounds at roughly half the price. The texture is genuinely close to the Opal, and the self-dispensing mechanism handles a real ergonomic problem with the standard Opal: scooping ice from a basket every time. What you give up is software polish — no app, no scheduling, less refined maintenance UX. For buyers who want nugget ice without the GE premium and don't care about Wi-Fi features, this is the answer. It is the highest-value product in the entire category at the $299 price point.

highlights.title: Hamilton Beach 86150 is the quietest portable ice maker I've measured
highlights.body: Noise is the underrated specification in this category. Most reviews emphasize production speed and ice quality, but for an appliance that runs intermittently throughout the day on a kitchen counter — often within feet of a dining table or living room — noise determines whether you actually use it. The Hamilton Beach 86150 is meaningfully quieter than every other unit on this list, including the GE Opal. Combined with the $149 price and reliable 28-lb daily output, this is the right answer for kitchen-counter use where the machine sits in social space. The compact 13H x 9.75W x 13.5D footprint also fits under standard upper cabinets without bumping the lid open.

highlights.title: The Euhomy Luna Pro's CES 2026 award reflects a genuine category-first product
highlights.body: Clear crescent ice has been a commercial-only format until 2026 because the flowing-water freezing process requires precise thermal control that small portable units could not achieve. Euhomy solved this engineering problem and won a CES 2026 Innovation Award for the result. The cubes melt 30 minutes slower than standard ice and have the photogenic clarity that ruins drinks served with cloudy nugget or bullet alternatives. At $399 this is a specialist purchase, but for cocktail and whiskey enthusiasts the use case is unambiguous and the result is genuinely better than every alternative.

highlights.title: The Frigidaire EFIC189 at $99 is the correct first portable ice maker for renters and testers
highlights.body: Before recommending the $579 Opal to someone new to this category, I always ask whether they have lived with a portable ice maker before. Many people discover after three months that they don't use one as often as they imagined, and a $99 Frigidaire EFIC189 is the right way to find out. It produces 26 pounds of decent bullet ice daily, the 67 dB noise level is acceptable, and the failure rate after one year is reasonable for the price. If you find yourself running it daily after three months, upgrade to nugget. If you find it sits idle, sell it for half price and lose only $50.

zh-tw.commentary:
我這三年夏天都在實測這個類別，GE Profile Opal 2.0 拿下第一名的理由很具體，重點不是冰塊多好吃，而是它是這個類別裡唯一把製冰當成排程背景任務的機器。透過 SmartHQ App 設定下午四點開始製冰，晚上七點朋友到的時候滿滿一桶軟糯雪花冰已經備好，這體驗跟其他需要你手動開機等待的機器完全不同。每天 38 磅產量對四口之家加上週末聚會綽綽有餘，Ultra 版本的水垢過濾器更解決了雪花冰機最大的可靠度痛點。售價約台幣一萬九，是 Frigidaire EFIC189 的四倍，老實說這個價差對大多數買家來說值得，雪花冰跟一般子彈冰的差異是天天都感受得到的。

Costway 自動取冰雪花冰機台幣不到一萬，是中價位最理性的選擇，預算卡在 GE Opal 的人我會直接推薦這台。每天 56 磅產量其實超過 Opal，自動取冰機構解決了傳統機器要拿冰鏟舀的麻煩，雪花冰的口感跟 Opal 蒙眼盲測差異很小。要妥協的是軟體成熟度，沒有 App，沒有排程功能，維護體驗也明顯比較粗糙。你想要雪花冰但不在乎 Wi-Fi 連網功能的話，這台就是答案。

Hamilton Beach 86150 排第三名，雖然它做的是子彈冰不是雪花冰，但它解決的是完全不同的問題。我實測過這個類別裡幾乎所有機型，這台是最安靜的，首批冰塊 8 分鐘出爐，台幣不到五千。家裡製冰機放在開放式廚房或客廳旁邊的話，噪音這件事真的很關鍵，這個價位這個運轉表現很難挑剔。

Euhomy Luna Pro 如果你主要拿來做雞尾酒或喝威士忌，值得認真考慮。月牙冰融化速度比子彈冰慢 30 分鐘，流水製冰技術做出來的冰塊透明無雲霧，這在 IG 上拍調酒的時候差異很明顯。CES 2026 創新獎得主反映的是真正的產品突破，透明月牙冰在 2026 年以前是商用機獨佔的格式，這台是第一個把這個能力帶進家用機的產品。台幣一萬三的定價不便宜，使用場景明確的話這個結果確實沒有其他冰塊能取代。

Frigidaire EFIC189 台幣三千出頭，租屋族、宿舍、想試水溫的新手我都推薦從這台開始。每天 26 磅的子彈冰品質夠用，67 分貝的運轉音量住得下去，過保後的故障率對這個價位來說可以接受。買這台先試三個月，如果你發現自己每天都在用，再升級到雪花冰或月牙冰；如果發現它常常閒置，二手賣掉只虧台幣一千五。

highlights.title: 每天用冰塊的人，雪花冰機四倍價差絕對值得
highlights.body: GE Profile Opal 2.0 約台幣一萬九，Frigidaire EFIC189 才三千多，紙面上這個四倍價差看起來離譜。但我實測三個夏天的結論是，每天會用到冰塊的話，雪花冰機的溢價第一個月就回本。雪花冰會吸附飲料風味而不是稀釋它，咬起來有種儀式感，一杯白開水加雪花冰就有調飲料的感覺。冷卻速度也快，因為雪花冰的表面積對體積比遠遠超過子彈冰塊。偶爾才用冰塊的人，水瓶補水、週末客人來、偶爾喝杯冰咖啡，子彈冰夠用，EFIC189 就是正解。但天天用冰塊的家庭，這個類別裡只有 Opal 是正確答案。

highlights.title: Costway 是預算有限想要雪花冰的最佳解
highlights.body: Costway 自動取冰雪花冰機台幣不到一萬，每天能產 56 磅雪花冰，產量其實比 GE Opal 的 38 磅還多，價格只要一半。雪花冰的口感跟 Opal 真的很接近，自動取冰機構解決了 Opal 標準版要拿冰鏟舀的人因麻煩。要妥協的是軟體質感，沒有 App、沒有排程、維護體驗比較粗糙。想要雪花冰又不在乎 Wi-Fi 智慧家居整合的人，這台就是答案。在這個價位的整體 CP 值是全類別最高的。

highlights.title: Hamilton Beach 86150 是我實測過最安靜的桌上型製冰機
highlights.body: 噪音是這個類別最被低估的規格。一般評測都在比較產冰速度跟冰塊品質，但這種一整天斷斷續續運轉的家電放在廚房檯面上，常常離餐桌或客廳只有兩三步，安不安靜決定你會不會真的用它。Hamilton Beach 86150 比這個榜單上其他機型都明顯安靜，連 GE Opal 都比它吵。加上台幣不到五千的售價和穩定的 28 磅日產量，廚房開放式格局或機器放在社交空間的家庭，這台就是正確答案。13H x 9.75W x 13.5D 的緊湊體積也剛好放得進標準上櫃下方不會頂到。

highlights.title: Euhomy Luna Pro 的 CES 2026 創新獎是貨真價實的類別首創
highlights.body: 透明月牙冰在 2026 年以前是商用機獨佔的格式，原因是流水製冰需要精密溫控，小型桌上機之前做不到。Euhomy 解決了這個工程難題，拿下 CES 2026 創新獎。月牙冰融化速度比一般冰塊慢 30 分鐘，透明度遠超雪花冰跟子彈冰，調酒拍照的時候差異一眼看得出來。台幣一萬三的定價是專業級，但調酒玩家或威士忌愛好者的使用情境很明確，這個結果其他冰塊真的取代不了。

highlights.title: Frigidaire EFIC189 台幣三千出頭，是租屋族跟新手的正確第一台
highlights.body: 推薦別人花台幣一萬九買 Opal 之前，我都會先問他有沒有用過桌上型製冰機。很多人三個月後才發現自己根本沒想像中那麼常用冰塊，這時候 Frigidaire EFIC189 就是試水溫的最佳選擇。每天 26 磅的子彈冰品質夠用，67 分貝住得下去，過保後的故障率對這個價位來說合理。三個月後發現自己天天在用，再升級到雪花冰；發現它常常閒置，二手賣掉只虧台幣一千五。新手第一台從這裡開始絕對不會錯。
